# kUSBInformationRootHubisBuiltInMask

**Enumeration Case**

The mask indicating that the root hub is built-in.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationRootHubisBuiltInMask = (1 << kUSBInformationRootHubisBuiltIn)
```
